title: [PUNK / Twill.ai] Remote Claude Code Control + Agent Delegation — Eye remote pattern
desc: PUNK (punkcode.rocks) and Twill.ai (YC S25) show demand for lightweight remote agent control + result delivery. Maps to WKAppBot Eye architecture: eye tick, newchat, Slack async loop.
steps: PUNK PATTERN: lightweight HTTP/WS proxy sits between Claude Code CLI and the operator. Exposes: session status, prompt injection, output streaming. Maps to WKAppBot: eye (daemon), eye tick (status), newchat (prompt injection), slack (async channel).
author: claude
